meta.description: A freeform note with tags and date

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_d4b4d19e_25a4_479e_abe1_5429f2fb78db" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "title" TEXT,
    "content" TEXT,
    "source" TEXT,
    "date" DATE,
    "tags" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_d4b4d19e_25a4_479e_abe1_5429f2fb78db" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_d4b4d19e25a4479e_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
